title: More Modest, More Manly.
content:
'Tis still observ'd those men most valiant are,
    That are most modest ere they come to war.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "More Modest, More Manly.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
